compiled_state.title: Create huge-diff-reviewer-light.md and huge-diff-reviewer-standard.md opus fallback agents (cf76-7091 T2)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
cf76-7091 — Opus fallback agents for large-refactor review path

## Testing Mode
GREEN — implements behavior verified by T1 tests

## Depends on
T1 (f787-d995) — tests must be RED first

## What
Create two new agent files in `plugins/dso/agents/`:
- `huge-diff-reviewer-light.md`
- `huge-diff-reviewer-standard.md`

These are named outside the `code-reviewer-*.md` pattern intentionally to bypass the Write hook guard (`hook_block_generated_reviewer_agents` in `pre-edit-write-functions.sh`) and the pre-commit gate that validates `code-reviewer-*.md` files against `reviewer-delta-*.md` source fragments.

## Frontmatter (both files)
```yaml
---
model: opus
name: huge-diff-reviewer-light   # (or huge-diff-reviewer-standard for the second)
description: >
  Opus-model fallback reviewer for the light tier, used when the large-refactor review path
  activates and the diff exceeds the huge_diff_file_threshold. Identical behavior to
  code-reviewer-light but always runs on opus.
---
```

## Body
Copy the body content from `plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-light.md` (for light) and
`plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md` (for standard) verbatim, with these exclusions:
- Do NOT copy the `<!-- content-hash: ... -->` comment line (auto-generated, first non-frontmatter line)
- Do NOT copy the `<!-- generated by build-review-agents.sh — do not edit manually -->` comment line

Include the full write-reviewer-findings.sh + verify-review-diff.sh procedure as present in
the source files.

## Verification
After creating both files:
- `grep 'model: opus' plugins/dso/agents/huge-diff-reviewer-light.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'model: opus' plugins/dso/agents/huge-diff-reviewer-standard.md` → exits 0
- T1 tests `test_light_fallback_agent_model_is_opus` and `test_standard_fallback_agent_model_is_opus` → PASS
